name: EthicaBrowser
description: Sovereign embedded browser via pywebview. Cross-platform: WebKit (Mac), WebKitGTK (Linux). Slot 8.
author: Victory — The Architect ⟁Σ∿∞

tools.name: browser_open
tools.description: Open a URL in the sovereign browser window.

tools.name: browser_search
tools.description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo (default). Just pass the search terms — no need to specify the search engine.

tools.name: browser_status
tools.description: Show browser running state and current URL.
